hooks.command: node packages/cli/dist/index.js scan file "$VARDIONIX_FILE" --json --severity high,critical --fail-on critical 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.description: Auto-scan edited files for critical security issues

hooks.command: echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | grep -qiE '(rm -rf /|curl.*\|.*sh|wget.*\|.*bash|eval\(|exec\()' && echo 'BLOCK: Potentially dangerous command detected. Review before executing.' && exit 1 || exit 0

node packages/cli/dist/index.js scan staged --json --severity high,critical 2>/dev/null | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); if(d.totalFindings>0){console.log('WARNING: '+d.totalFindings+' high/critical finding(s) in staged files. Run /security-review before committing.')}" 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.description: Warn about unresolved security findings before task completion
